verses.latin_vulgate: Canticum graduum Salomonis.   Nisi Dominus ædificaverit domum,  in vanum laboraverunt qui ædificant eam.  Nisi Dominus custodierit civitatem,  frustra vigilat qui custodit eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁ֥יר הַֽמַּעֲל֗וֹת לִשְׁלֹ֫מֹ֥ה אִם־יְהֹוָ֤ה ׀ לֹא־יִבְנֶ֬ה בַ֗יִת שָׁ֤וְא עָמְל֣וּ בוֹנָ֣יו בּ֑וֹ אִם־יְהֹוָ֥ה לֹא־יִשְׁמׇר־עִ֝֗יר שָׁ֤וְא ׀ שָׁקַ֬ד שׁוֹמֵֽר׃
verses.king_james: Except the Lord build the house, they labour in vain that build it: except the Lord keep the city, the watchman waketh but in vain.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vanum est vobis ante lucem surgere :  surgite postquam sederitis,  qui manducatis panem doloris.  Cum dederit dilectis suis somnum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁ֤וְא לָכֶ֨ם מַשְׁכִּ֪ימֵֽי ק֡וּם מְאַחֲרֵי־שֶׁ֗בֶת אֹ֭כְלֵי לֶ֣חֶם הָעֲצָבִ֑ים כֵּ֤ן יִתֵּ֖ן לִידִיד֣וֹ שֵׁנָֽא׃
verses.king_james: It is vain for you to rise up early, to sit up late, to eat the bread of sorrows: for so he giveth his beloved sleep.

verses.latin_vulgate: ecce hæreditas Domini, filii ;  merces, fructus ventris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּ֤ה נַחֲלַ֣ת יְהֹוָ֣ה בָּנִ֑ים שָׂ֝כָ֗ר פְּרִ֣י הַבָּֽטֶן׃
verses.king_james: Lo, children are an heritage of the Lord: and the fruit of the womb is his reward.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sicut sagittæ in manu potentis,  ita filii excussorum.
verses.king_james: As arrows are in the hand of a mighty man; so are children of the youth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Beatus vir qui implevit desiderium suum ex ipsis :  non confundetur cum loquetur inimicis suis in porta.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַשְׁרֵ֤י הַגֶּ֗בֶר אֲשֶׁ֤ר מִלֵּ֥א אֶת־אַשְׁפָּת֗וֹ מֵ֫הֶ֥ם לֹֽא־יֵבֹ֑שׁוּ כִּֽי־יְדַבְּר֖וּ אֶת־אוֹיְבִ֣ים בַּשָּֽׁעַר׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Happy is the man that hath his quiver full of them: they shall not be ashamed, but they shall speak with the enemies in the gate.
